name: Wrong number pivot to crypto/romance
description: A friendly 'wrong number' text that, if you reply, pivots to chit-chat, then to a friendship or romance, then to a crypto investing scheme (often called 'pig butchering').
example: Hi David, are we still on for dinner Saturday at 7?
red_flags: Unknown number addressing a name that isn't yours
Friendly opener designed to get any reply
After replying 'wrong number,' sender continues the conversation
Eventually mentions a crypto trading platform with high returns
